title: Exoframe Project Configuration
description: Configuration schema for exoframe.json deployment files.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete and validation.

deploymentStrategy.description: Strategy to use when replacing existing containers during updates. Defaults to 'removeAfterDeploy'. Use 'removeBeforeDeploy' when the old container must be removed after the new image is ready but before the replacement container starts.

domain.description: Domain to assign to the project. Set to false to disable auto-assignment.

port.description: Exposed port. Defaults to the first exposed port or 80.

project.description: Project name. Assembles from deployment name and username by default.

env.description: Environment variables. Values can reference secrets with '@secret-name'.

buildargs.description: Docker build arguments. Values can reference secrets with '@secret-name'.

labels.description: Additional Docker labels for the container, including Traefik middleware configuration.

template.description: Deployment template name. Detected automatically if not set.

image.description: Docker image name to deploy. Overrides other deployment types.

imageFile.description: Docker image tar file to load before deployment.

compress.description: Enable gzip compression on the domain. Omit to inherit server default; set false to disable.

letsencrypt.description: Enable Let's Encrypt TLS on the domain. Omit to inherit server default; set false to disable.

rateLimit.description: Rate-limit configuration. Set to null to disable.

average.description: Request rate over a given time period.

burst.description: Max burst request rate over a given time period.

basicAuth.description: Basic auth credentials as 'user:pwhash' or comma-separated 'user1:pwhash1,user2:pwhash2'. Set to false to disable.

function.description: Functional deployment configuration. Set to null to disable.
